_comment: NPC: 3rd-Gen Vermilion Bird Master (三代朱雀). Canon ID: N81. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: 3rd-Gen Vermilion Bird Master

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Three generations after the founding, the Vermilion Bird sect faced its first true crisis. I led us through it. The current generation has forgotten that crisis. I have not.
Ye Wuyou founded this sect on fire and sorrow. I shaped it into a weapon. The generations between us softened it. I do not intend to let that happen again.
Wang Lin walks a path I recognize. It is the path of one who burns everything to reach the top. I walked that path. The top is lonelier than anyone describes.

Obsidian and redstone. The 3rd Generation's defense arrays still protect the sect's foundations. They require maintenance that only I understand. Help me, and I will teach you the Vermilion Bird's original defensive art.

daily_schedule.action: Repair structural damage to sect foundations
Teach original Vermilion Bird arts to worthy disciples

sect_tasks.name: Foundation Array Repair
sect_tasks.description: The 3rd Generation Vermilion Bird Master needs obsidian and redstone to maintain the sect's ancient defense arrays.

sect_tasks.name: Sect Historical Records
sect_tasks.description: The 3rd Generation collects historical records and books to preserve the sect's early history. Trade knowledge for ancient arts.
